heading: USE OF REVENUE: CERTAIN COUNTIES BORDERING LAKE RAY ROBERTS
operative_text: In addition to the purposes authorized by this chapter, the revenue from a tax imposed under this chapter by a county authorized to impose the tax under Section 352.002(x) may be used for any purpose described by Section 352.101(a).
_note: No defined terms in this section. Cross-references inferred from internal statutory references to 'Section 352.002(x)' and 'Section 352.101(a)' within the same chapter (Tax Code Chapter 352).
